---
title: "Welcome"
---

::: {.column-page}

::: {.profile-picture-container}
![Profile Picture](images/profile.jpeg)
:::

# 👋 Welcome to My Portfolio

I'm **Prasansha Ojha**, a Data Analyst and Business Analyst dedicated to transforming raw data into actionable business insights through advanced analytics and strategic data visualization.

## What I Do

I specialize in end-to-end data analytics—from data engineering and ETL pipelines to exploratory analysis, statistical testing, and interactive dashboard creation. I combine technical expertise with business acumen to drive data-informed decision-making.

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
### 📊 Data Analytics
Transforming complex datasets into insights
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
### 🔧 Data Engineering
Building robust ETL pipelines and data infrastructure
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
### 📈 Visualization
Creating compelling Power BI dashboards
:::

::::

---

## Featured Projects

Explore some of my recent work and learn about the challenges I've tackled.

[Browse All Projects →](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## Get in Touch

Interested in collaborating or want to learn more? I'd love to hear from you!

[Contact Me →](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
